response.justification: Sarah Smith has extensive full-stack and systems development experience, but her resume lacks direct exposure to C++ on Windows platforms, SQL Server/Oracle database systems, or capital markets/fixed-income domain knowledge. While she has C++ experience in embedded systems (National Instruments), her recent work is heavily focused on TypeScript, Node.js, and D language, with no mention of financial systems or Windows-specific C++ development.
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship with TDD, CI/CD, and modern development practices
Proven ability to learn new languages and frameworks quickly
Experience with high-performance systems and low-latency applications
concerns: No demonstrated experience with C++ on Windows platforms (mandatory requirement)
No SQL Server or Oracle database experience specified (mandatory requirement)
No domain expertise in capital markets, investment banking, or fixed income (mandatory requirement)

key_factors.factor: Capital markets / fixed income domain expertise
